meaning: n.(在野外烧煮食物)<美>野外郊游时烹调的野餐,野烹食物adj.野外烹饮聚会的
examples: I've been invited to a cookout this weekend.
Why don't you guys come a cookout on Friday night?
They went camping to the stream and had a cookout to eat there.
In Tennessee, the woman died during what had been a lazy, happy day at a home cookout.
Try a burger and hot dog cookout near headquarters in Valley Forge, Pa.
